No upper trough pattern is visible in the specified northern Korean Peninsula area.
Confluent flow is noted in this region with streamlines converging.
No diffluent flow observed in northern Korean Peninsula region.
Jet axis extends into southern Korean Peninsula (33-37N) shown by isotach lines above 60 knots.
No clear jet core detected in southern Korean Peninsula as isotach maximum is weaker.
Upper trough absent in southern Korean Peninsula area.
Confluent flow patterns present in southern Korean Peninsula.
No diffluent flow visible in southern Korean Peninsula.
Subtropical jet axis is depicted over northern East China Sea (28-34N, 120-128E).
Jet core is present in the subtropical jet over northern East China Sea.
No upper ridge shown by contour lines in the northern East China Sea region.
Jet axis identifiable over western Japan (31-38N, 130-138E).
No strong jet core visible in western Japan area.
Diffluent flow pattern observable over western Japan by spreading of streamlines.
Jet axis extends over eastern Japan offshore region (30-40N, 140-150E).
Jet core present offshore eastern Japan shown by isotach maxima.
No upper trough in eastern Japan offshore region.
No polar jet axis visible north of Tibet Plateau in specified range (35-45N, 90-105E).
